_comment: POST /api/v1/application-configs — Qdrant vector database on agentsonly cluster (CC-059)

_schema_review.values_override: str — per-cluster values override (empty = use application-level values_yaml)
_schema_review.external_hosts: list[str] — external hostnames to expose; empty = internal only

_note: Qdrant is internal-only on agentsonly — no external HTTPRoute. Access via qdrant.qdrant.svc.cluster.local:6333 from in-cluster services (podzone-mpc).
